title: Cross-mission integration of tomato spaceflight transcriptomes: spaceflight resembles a salicylic-acid-deficient state
description: Reproducible meta-integration of two ISS tomato RNA-seq studies (OSD-767 light x spaceflight; APH MoneyMaker/NahG SA x spaceflight). Shows that gene-level leaf responses do not replicate across cultivar/chamber/mission, but the stress-pattern (Plant PhysioSpace) response is conserved, and the spaceflight signature matches the SA-deficient (NahG) state (OSD-767 root vs APH NahG Pearson r = 0.78), with SA signalling acting as the causal buffer.

related_identifiers.identifier: APH tomato spaceflight RNA-seq study (GeneLab OSD-# to confirm)
